strings.KEYWORD_HELLBENT: <style=cKeywordName>Hellbent</style><style=cSub><style=cIsUtility>Semel in specie</style>, infra <style=cIsHealth>25% valetudine</style> cadens impleat mensuram tuam et praestet gratuitum <color=#A556FF>Devil Trigger</color>.
strings.KEYWORD_SONOFSPARDA:
<style=cKeywordName>Devil Arms</style><style=cSub>Animae quorundam ducum post mortem in arma adipiscenda transformantur. Tange cursum cum arma exserta sunt ut per eos circules.

<style=cKeywordName>Speed</style><style=cSub>Curre incredibili celeritate. In proelio activari non potest.

<style=cKeywordName>Air Hike</style><style=cSub>Saltus duplex.

<style=cKeywordName>Enemy Step</style><style=cSub>Saltus duplex ab hoste.
strings.ROB_DANTE_BODY_DESCRIPTION:
<color=#B70027>Dante</color> est legendarus daemonum venator qui pugnat cum par pistolorum et gladio.<color=#CCD3E0>

< ! > Ebony & Ivory est fidelis constansque vulneris fons.

< ! > Quisque Devil Arm unicum motuum corpus habet, experimentum cum directionalibus ingressibus ut maxime ex eis utaris.

< ! > Utere Trick ad actiones abrogandas et ictus invenientes vitandos.

< ! > Devil Trigger res et talia facit.
strings.ROB_DANTE_BODY_LORE:
Scis, revera melius debui explorare labores meos antequam eos susciperem.

Quidam ingreditur officinam meam loquens de monstris interficiendis. Realiter rigidus et proprius, fortasse militaris. Sclopus ubi brachium sinistrum esse debet. Negotionem significare debet.

Iactat sacculum pecuniae et libellum navis super mensam. Hoc me pulchre sedere faciet per menses!

Sed maneo frigidus, difficile adipiscendus.

'Longum opus longam mercedem significat.'

'Credo hoc mutabit mentem tuam.'

Photographema cadit super mensam. Ostendit hominem in... vitro captum? Non possum dignoscere vultum eius, sed illum pectorale undique scirem.

Hic homo suum officium domesticum fecit. Puto me in hanc navem ascendere debere.

'Pactum.'

Nunc per planetam gradior purgans stercus.

Hebdomades quaerendi, interficiendi, supervivendi.

Sed invenire <color=#32D2FF>eum</color> debeo.

Opus est opus, nonne?

<color=#B70027>Agitemus.</color>
strings.ROB_DANTE_BODY_MELEE_DESCRIPTION: Para <style=cIsUtility>arma retenta</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Primarium</style> fit <style=cIsDamage>impetus proelii propinqui</style>, et impetus hostium <style=cIsUtility>avertuntur</style> dum retinentur.
strings.ROB_DANTE_BODY_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION: <color=#B70027>Dante</color> habet aditum ad plures <style=cIsDamage>unicas peritias</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Supervola pro plus informatione.</style>
strings.ROB_DANTE_BODY_PRIMARY_DESCRIPTION: Velociter puga pro <style=cIsDamage>120% vulneris</style>. Desine pugnare pro <style=cIsUtility>1 secunda</style> ut praepares <style=cIsDamage>ictum onustum</style> qui infligit <style=cIsDamage>350% vulneris</style>.
strings.ROB_DANTE_BODY_SPECIAL_DEVILTRIGGER_DESC: <color=#B70027>Hellbent.</color> Activa <color=#A556FF>Devil Trigger</color>, exinanire mensuram tuam ut acquireas tempus <style=cIsUtility>loricam</style>, <style=cIsHealing>regenerationem</style> et <style=cIsDamage>vulnus</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Ictus proelii propinqui implent mensuram.</style>
strings.ROB_DANTE_BODY_SPECIAL_DEVILTRIGGER_SCEP: <color=#B70027>Hellbent.</color> Activa <color=#A556FF>Devil Trigger</color>, exinanire mensuram tuam ut acquireas tempus <style=cIsUtility>loricam</style>, <style=cIsHealing>regenerationem</style> et <style=cIsDamage>vulnus</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Ictus proelii propinqui implent mensuram.</style>\n<color=#d299ff>SCEPTRO: Vasta hostes tuos gladiis evocatis dum activus.</color>
strings.ROB_DANTE_BODY_SPECIAL_HOLYCROSS_DESCRIP: Invoca potestatem <color=#FF0033>Providentiae</color>, dissolvens <style=cIsUtility>massivam flammam</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>300% vulneris per pulsus</style>. Finitur cum <style=cIsDamage>4000% vulneris</style> supernova.
strings.ROB_DANTE_BODY_SPECIAL_PISTOL_DESCRIPTIO: Puga <style=cIsUtility>plumbum argenteum</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>800% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Ictus capitis</style> infligunt <style=cIsDamage>2x vulnus</style>. Caedes <style=cIsUtility>restituunt omnes frigorationes tuas</style>.
strings.ROB_DANTE_BODY_SPECIAL_PISTOL_SCEPTER_DE: Puga <style=cIsUtility>plumbum argenteum</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>800% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Ictus capitis</style> infligunt <style=cIsDamage>2x vulnus</style>. Caedes <style=cIsUtility>restituunt omnes frigorationes tuas</style>.\n<color=#d299ff>SCEPTRO: Infligit 9000% vulneris.</color>
strings.ROB_DANTE_BODY_SPECIAL_SDT_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Tene</style> ut infundas mensuram in <color=#B70027>Sin Devil Trigger</color> mensuram. <style=cIsUtility>Tene</style> cum plena est ut dissolvas tuam <style=cIsDamage>veram daemonis formam</style> pro brevi tempore.
strings.ROB_DANTE_BODY_SPECIAL_SDT_SCEPTER_DESCR: <style=cIsUtility>Tene</style> ut infundas mensuram in <color=#B70027>Sin Devil Trigger</color> mensuram. <style=cIsUtility>Tene</style> cum plena est ut dissolvas tuam <style=cIsDamage>veram daemonis formam</style> pro brevi tempore.\n<color=#d299ff>SCEPTRO: Vasta hostes tuos gladiis evocatis dum activus.</color>
strings.ROB_DANTE_BODY_UTILITY_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Cursor</style> in directionem, fit breviter <style=cIsUtility>invulnerabilis</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Ictus proelii propinqui statim reficiunt hanc peritiam.</style>
strings.ROB_DANTE_BROTHERSOUL_DESC: Quisque <style=cIsUtility>verberis crepitus</style> gignit <style=cIsDamage>lunarem flammae pilam</style>, quisque <style=cIsUtility>motus gladii</style> gignit <style=cIsDamage>lunare fragmentum</style>, quisque <style=cIsUtility>verberis ictus</style> dissolvit <style=cIsDamage>terrain undas impulsum</style> et quisque <style=cIsUtility>cursus</style> generat <style=cIsHealing>20% barrieream</style>.
strings.ROB_DANTE_BROTHERSOUL_PICKUP: Utere potestate Regis Nihil sicut tua propria.
strings.ROB_DANTE_DEVILSHRINE_DESC: Non satis mihi solvi ut haec scribam.
strings.ROB_DANTE_ITEM_EFFECT_BACKUPMAG: Acquire peritiam recondendi additos Ictus Onustos.
strings.ROB_DANTE_ITEM_EFFECT_BRAINSTALKS: Devil Trigger nullam mensuram consumit dum activus.
strings.ROB_DANTE_ITEM_EFFECT_LUMINOUSSHOT: Onustatur dum arma tua exserta sunt. Restituitur cum ea recondis.
strings.ROB_DANTE_KEY_DESC: Adhibetur ad aperiendum <color=#FFFF00>Archa Thesaurorum</color>. Hae archae continent <color=#FF0033>reliquiam sacram</color> et gignunt omni <style=cIsUtility>quarto</style> stadio in <style=cIsDamage>loco fixo</style>.
strings.ROB_DANTE_KEY_PICKUP: Adhibetur ad aperiendum Archam Thesaurorum. Lucet cum prope archam.
strings.ROB_DANTE_KEYFRAGMENT_DESC: Fracta clavis pars. Collige 3 ut formet integram clavem.
strings.ROB_DANTE_KEYFRAGMENT_PICKUP: Fracta clavis pars. Collige 3 ut formet integram clavem.
strings.ROB_DANTE_QUEEN_DESC: Scuta magna gemina apta ad graves ictus et multitudinis regimen.
strings.ROB_NERO_BODY_PRIMARY_DESCRIPTION: Puga bis, pro <style=cIsDamage>200% vulneris</style> et <style=cIsDamage>350% vulneris</style>. Tene pro <style=cIsUtility>1 secunda</style> ut praepares <style=cIsDamage>ictum onustum</style>.
